# 03 â€” Gradle Rules

## General

- This repo uses Kotlin DSL (`build.gradle.kts`).
- The root build applies the `flx-provider` plugin to all subprojects; do not re-apply it in provider modules.
- Manage all dependency versions via the version catalog (`gradle/libs.versions.toml`).

## What the `flx-provider` plugin does

The plugin (from `core-gradle`) is responsible for:

- Generating `manifest.json` from `flxProvider { ... }` configuration
- Compiling provider classes to DEX
- Assembling the `.flx` provider artifact
- Registering tasks: `compileDex`, `compileResources`, `package` (alias: `make`), `deployWithAdb`, `generateUpdaterJson`

**You do not construct `ProviderManifest` or `ProviderMetadata` manually.** They are generated by the plugin.

## Versions â€” keep plugin and SDK compatible

- `core-stubs` and `core-gradle` versions are in `gradle/libs.versions.toml`.
- When upgrading `core-stubs`, also upgrade `core-gradle` in the same change to keep the Gradle plugin and SDK compatible.

## Root plugin wiring (recommended)

```kotlin
// build.gradle.kts (root)
subprojects {
    apply(plugin = "flx-provider")

    android {
        compileSdk = 35
        defaultConfig { minSdk = 21 }
    }

    flxProvider {
        author(
            name = "your-handle",
            image = "https://github.com/your-handle.png",
            socialLink = "https://github.com/your-handle",
        )
        setRepository("https://github.com/your-handle/your-providers-repo")
    }
}
```

## Provider module essentials

In `providers/<ProviderModule>/build.gradle.kts`:

```kotlin
import com.flixclusive.model.provider.Language
import com.flixclusive.model.provider.ProviderStatus
import com.flixclusive.model.provider.ProviderType

android {
    namespace = "com.yourorg.provider.my_provider"
}

flxProvider {
    id           = "prov-my-provider"   // MUST be stable â€” never change after first release
    providerName = "My Provider"
    description  = "Short description."

    versionMajor = 1
    versionMinor = 0
    versionPatch = 0
    versionBuild = 0

    status       = ProviderStatus.Working
    language     = Language.Multiple
    providerType = ProviderType.All
    adult        = false

    requiresResources = false           // set true only when you actually ship res/ files
    // excludeFromUpdaterJson = true    // use only to hide a WIP provider
}

dependencies {
    implementation(libs.core.stubs.provider)
}
```

## Dependency guidance

| Config | When to use |
|---|---|
| `implementation(...)` | Library must ship inside the provider artifact |
| `compileOnly(...)` | Host app/runtime already provides this library (OkHttp, Jsoup, Compose, etc.) |

Do not use `fatImplementation` â€” it is no longer part of this template.

## Common tasks

```bash
# Build and package the .flx artifact
./gradlew :MyProvider:make

# Deploy to a connected emulator/device
./gradlew :MyProvider:deployWithAdb

# Deploy using the debug build of Flixclusive
./gradlew :MyProvider:deployWithAdb --debug-app

# Deploy and wait for a debugger to attach
./gradlew :MyProvider:deployWithAdb --wait-for-debugger

# Run unit tests
./gradlew :MyProvider:testDebugUnitTest
```
